'''Maydh''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ferroan]] from [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] who joined [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and several other [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] in a meeting with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] priest [[Harrar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
